title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY trading above 158.00, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD Retail Sentiment
text: AUD/USD retail sentiment at 9% long / 91% short, indicating an extreme short bias; contrarian reversal risk is high.

title: Fed-ECB Rate Differential
text: Fed-ECB 175bp differential weighs on EUR/USD; pair holds at 1.1767.

title: VIX and S&P 500
text: VIX at 17.5 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.20%.

title: USD/JPY vs VIX Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation breaks at +0.672, indicating JPY no longer acting as a safe haven; z-score at +1.36σ.
